zh.lifeSummary: 當Guermond de Picquigny I於0990年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯時，他的父親Eustache de Picquigny31歲，母親Mathilde De Ponthieu21歲。他於1014年與Adele d'Ailly在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1066年在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guermond de Picquigny I于0990年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯时，他的父亲Eustache de Picquigny31岁，母亲Mathilde De Ponthieu21岁。他于1014年与Adele d'Ailly在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1066年在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guermond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Germund, composed of the elements gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’ + mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Germaine
meanings: Feminine form of the rarer French masculine name Germain (Late Latin Germanus ‘brother’ the original reference may have been to the concept of Christian brotherhood). Germaine Cousin ( c.1579–1601 ) was a Provençal saint, the daughter of a poor farmer. Her canonization in 1867 gave an additional impulse to the use of the name in France, from where it was imported into the English‐speaking world. This form of the name is now also used occasionally as a boy's name. See also Jermaine .

variants.name: Germundson
meanings: Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Germundsson: patronymic from the personal name Germund (see Germond ).

en.lifeSummary: When Guermond de Picquigny I was born in 0990, in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Eustache de Picquigny, was 31 and his mother, Mathilde De Ponthieu, was 21. He married Adele d'Ailly in 1014, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1066, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guermond de Picquigny I est né en 0990, à Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Eustache de Picquigny, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Ponthieu, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Adele d'Ailly en 1014, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1066, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guermond de Picquigny I 0990 in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache de Picquigny 31 und seine Mutter Mathilde De Ponthieu 21. Er hat 1014 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Adele d'Ailly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1066 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guermond de Picquigny I è nato il nel 0990 nel Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache de Picquigny, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde De Ponthieu, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Adele d'Ailly nel 1014, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1066, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guermond de Picquigny Iが0990年にフランスピカーディソンメアミエンスで生まれた時，父Eustache de Picquignyは31歳，母Mathilde De Ponthieuは21歳であった。1014年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーでAdele d'Aillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guermond de Picquigny I(이)가 0990년 프랑스 피카디 솜 아미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache de Picquigny(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde De Ponthieu(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1014년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 Adele d'Ailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guermond de Picquigny I nasceu em 0990, em Amiens, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Eustache de Picquigny, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Ponthieu, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Adele d'Ailly em 1014, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1066, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guermond de Picquigny I родился в 0990 г. в местности амиенс, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache de Picquigny было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Ponthieu, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Adele d'Ailly в 1014 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1066 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guermond de Picquigny I nació en 0990, en Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Eustache de Picquigny, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Ponthieu, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Adele d'Ailly en 1014, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1066, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
